title: Modernize fail-closed Renode CI
description: Separate from selector cleanup: update Renode CI to the validated Zephyr 3.7/Renode 1.16.1 environment, apply required overlays/configs, remove continue-on-error from required paths, and assert deterministic UART plus simulator effects.
acceptance_criteria: Required Renode builds/runs fail the workflow on error; canonical targets and pinned tooling are used; runtime jobs assert late UART markers and independent simulator TX; workflow syntax validates.
